why_school_section_was_not_visible: The full Selected Parcel School Assignment card was mounted only inside Due Diligence after a parcel was selected.
The default Overview panel did not mount the selected-parcel school hook, so school assignment and utilization were not visible from the primary map/search workflow.
Countywide school assignment summary existed as a supporting context panel, but it was tucked behind collapsed due-diligence context rather than placed in a clear model/data area.
where_school_card_now_appears: Overview selected-parcel summary includes a compact School Assignment snapshot with elementary, middle, and high assignment labels.
Due Diligence selected parcel details keep the full School Assignment card.
Methodology includes a countywide School Assignment Summary under the School Constraint Summary section.

browser_selection_smoke_test: Searched and selected CFS-PARCEL-0149771666 from the top parcel search.
Searched and selected CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 from the top parcel search.
Both selections updated selected parcel state, map active selection, parcel cage/focus, and school assignment display.

selected_parcel_school_display_behavior: Shows elementary, middle, and high attendance-zone assignment.
Shows Capacity Data Needed instead of implying official school capacity is available.
Shows Not scored when school_constraint_score is null.
Shows presentation-derived utilization values when matched.
Shows needs-verification/source caveats for utilization seed values.
Shows CCS V1 scope / QA review caveat when a level is missing or unmatched.
Does not hide the school section when capacity, score, utilization, or one assignment is unavailable.
layer_rail_cleanup: Default desktop rail width increased to 360px.
Resize range changed to 300px minimum and 520px maximum.
Added slim collapsed rail with clear expand button.
Added clear collapse button in expanded state.
Map Layers disclosure is closed by default.
Closed Map Layers disclosure now unmounts its control contents until opened.
Development Hotspot advanced filters are collapsed by default and unmount their controls until opened.
Resize drag updates the CSS grid variable directly and commits React state on pointer release.
text_overflow_and_legend_fixes: Flood Constraints legend uses vertical rows with full labels: Severe / floodway, High / SFHA, Moderate.
FEMA Flood Zones legend uses vertical rows with full labels: Floodway, SFHA, Moderate, Minimal.
Layer status labels use readable wrapping badges rather than tiny one-letter/truncated chips.
School assignment names and summary terms wrap instead of truncating important capacity/score labels.
map_performance_changes: Closed Map Layers does not mount hidden layer controls.
Closed Development Hotspot advanced filters do not mount hidden filter selects.
Sidebar resize avoids repeated full React layout state updates during pointer movement.
Existing Phase 9B Cabarrus local SceneView constraints, medium quality, disabled stars/atmosphere/shadows, and FEMA default limit of 100 remain preserved.
fullscreen_map_behavior: Fullscreen map mode hides the right intelligence panel.
Fullscreen map mode hides the bottom KPI bar.
Left layer rail remains available in fullscreen mode.
Left layer rail can collapse/expand in fullscreen mode.
Selected parcel active selection and focus card remain visible.

validation_results.backend_tests: not run; backend code was not changed

smoke_test_results: Selected CFS-PARCEL-0149771666 from top search; Overview and Due Diligence showed school assignment, Capacity Data Needed, Not scored, presentation-derived utilization where matched, and CCS/QA caveat for missing middle assignment.

Selected CFS-PARCEL-0149726579 from top search; Due Diligence showed Carl A Furr ES, Roberta Road MS, Jay M Robinson HS, Capacity Data Needed, Not scored, and presentation-derived utilization caveats.
Layer rail collapsed to a slim rail and expanded cleanly.
Map Layers rail stayed focused on operational controls.
Methodology displayed School Assignment Summary and moved Model Data Registry content.
Fullscreen map mode hid the right intelligence panel and bottom KPI strip while retaining the left layer rail.
Selected parcel cage/focus remained visible during smoke testing.
remaining_known_issues: Some placeholder map layers remain intentionally mock/readiness toggles until authoritative data is connected.
Official school capacity/enrollment data is still absent, so capacity scoring remains disabled.
Presentation-derived school utilization remains preliminary and needs verification.
ArcGIS console continues to emit existing label-placement warnings for some draped graphics; this task did not change SceneView label behavior.
